_comment: Main story quests. Each promotes the player rank on completion. Side/townsfolk quests will live in a separate file.

wizard_letter.title: A Letter from the Wizard
wizard_letter.description: Read the Wizard's letter and arrive at the abandoned farm.

first_harvest.title: First Harvest
first_harvest.description: Plant and harvest your first crop.

help_blacksmith.title: A Smith in Need
help_blacksmith.description: Bring the Blacksmith 5 stone and 5 wood.

repair_bridge.title: Bridge to the Coast
repair_bridge.description: Gather materials and help the Carpenter repair the old bridge.

restore_town_square.title: Heart of the Town
restore_town_square.description: Restore the town square fountain and gardens.

collect_relics.title: Whispers of the Past
collect_relics.description: Recover three magical relics scattered across the valley.

wizards_trial.title: The Wizard's Trial
wizards_trial.description: Prove yourself worthy of becoming the protector of Greenfield Valley.
